name: AnG National Critics
text: G wanted her windows tinted for her birthday. So we threw a dart and picked Pacific Window. Dana set up an appointment same day and we didn't wait a minute past two p.m. A loved the price and Dana himself is a great guy. He explained tinting and the different products he offered. He started the process at exactly 2:05, and completed the work at 2:42. No wasted time and the work is clean. G is happy, which makes A happy. Dana reinforced his commitment to honoring his warranty if something happens. All around, it was a marvelous experience. Here in town, tint shops are a dime a dozen, but Dana has over 15 years experience and he's reasonably priced. Honestly, I wouldn't go anywhere else moving forward to get my tint work done.

name: Sean M.
text: This is without a doubt the best tint shop in town. The product they use is top quality and lasts forever. I've had over a dozen cars tinted with Pacific Window Tint and never had a problem. There have been no bubbles, no peeling, no fading, nothing. On top of that they warranty their work, so it is a win win. This is a five-star shop.

name: Dennis N.
text: Took my 2017 Silverado in on a Saturday. As usual, Dana did an amazing job. This was my 3rd car he has done for me. Always a professional job. Definitely go to him if you want a professional tint job. Plus, lifetime Warranty.

name: Robert M.
text: Has a very comfortable atmosphere and professional. Have had my crossfire done and now the edge 'no problems' yes would recommend pacific window tint.

name: Chris D.
text: Great customer service and their product is top notch! We've had 3 cars done by them and 2 of our businesses. They are super clean and very knowledgeable about their products.

name: Joe P.
text: Another Big Thank You for doing the Tint on our Honda Pilot. Our Go to Tint Shop you have helped me with all my Civics and the Pilot today Awesome work as always quality and price. Till next future Tint appt. Thanks again.

name: Dan B.
text: Very friendly and efficient. They had an appointment for me exactly when I wanted it. I was in and out within 50 minutes. The work is excellent, as is the customer service. Not to mention, the facility is very clean and organized.

name: Teresa W.
text: I made the appt based on reviews here on Yelp. They were punctual, answered all my questions, are reasonably priced considering the great quality of the service and product, and can I say the car looks sweet!!!! I'm planning to taking in my other vehicle.

name: Albert D.
text: This place came highly recommended by a friend, and we were lucky enough to get a same day appointment. The tint is beautiful, after a few weeks now having it, it is smooth and dark like I like it. Professional installation, and no dreaded bubbles. The facility itself was clean and will organized, and the staff were very friendly.
